About Me

Precision. Strategy. Excellence.

I am Sudin Neupane, an ACCA Professional Level candidate (SBR in progress) and dual-certified cloud accountant holding both the Xero Advisor Certification and QuickBooks Online ProAdvisor Certification. I combine rigorous academic training with real-world client delivery, managing full-cycle bookkeeping for three active business clients with a zero-discrepancy reconciliation standard.

My technical foundation spans IFRS-aligned financial reporting, VAT compliance, AP/AR management, month-end close, and audit-ready documentation — skills refined through ACCA study (80+ in both Financial Reporting and UK Taxation) and applied directly in live cloud accounting environments.

I operate independently in async, remote-ready workflows and hold myself to professional standards in every client engagement — from clean general ledgers to clear written communication that builds client confidence.
